name: Northern Vertex Mining Corp.
summary: Northern Vertex Mining Corp. acquires, explores for, develops, and operates mineral properties in the United States and Canada. Its flagship project is the 100% owned Moss Gold-Silver mine located in Mohave County, Arizona. It also holds interests in the Hercules Gold Project located in Walker Lane Gold Trend in western Nevada. The company was formerly known as Northern Vertex Capital Inc. and changed its name to Northern Vertex Mining Corp. in February 2012. Northern Vertex Mining Corp. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
